title: Verify user can complete the full cancellation process and UI updates accordingly
description: Tests the flow where a user rejects all retention offers, successfully cancels their trial, and the UI reflects the cancelled state.
preconditions: User is in an active trial and belongs to the target cohort.

steps.description: 3. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
4. On the 'Incentive' offer pop-up (if shown), click the secondary action to cancel.
5. Observe the feedback pop-up and close it.

expected_result: The trial is immediately cancelled. The homepage widget updates to the 'cancelled trial design'. The Trial Corner hub shows content as locked. The 'feedback-popup-viewed' event is fired.
